creator: trombik1973@gmail.com
text:
the bug is exactly same described at:

https://bugs.launchpad.net/kicad/+bug/1778426

if the proposed, but rejected, patch in the bug is applied, the "fp-lib-table files contain no library with nickname" warning disappears but the footprint preview does not work (shows nothing in the preview window).

https://launchpadlibrarian.net/375810294/0001-fp_lib_table-fixed-unsuccessful-dynamic_cast.patch

what I have tried is reverting the patch in the bug (https://git.launchpad.net/kicad/patch/?id=9b1f2447b6368ff68ae22b0b3bcbd1a72c8f4a45 does not fix).

the build box is FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT 1300121, amd64.
